description: Reference record for an encrypted attachment shared in a private group. The bytes live in a content-addressed blob store (iroh-blobs) as ciphertext; this record points at them by ciphertext hash and carries the AEAD nonce needed to decrypt. Modeled on the atproto `blob` convention, diverging in that `ref` is the BLAKE3 hash of CIPHERTEXT and `nonce` is added; the decryption key is never stored.

ciphertext_ref.description: Lowercase hex BLAKE3 hash (64 chars) of the ciphertext as stored in iroh-blobs.

nonce.description: Lowercase hex ChaCha20-Poly1305 nonce (24 chars / 12 bytes).
